title: Add waypoint and navigation marker system
description:
## Problem
The agent has no way to remember locations between sessions or mark points of interest. Commands like "remember this spot", "set a waypoint", or "go to my base" are not supported.

## Agent Request
From session log: "ability to set waypoints" was suggested by the agent.

## Scope
- Add a `SetWaypoint` / `GoToWaypoint` / `ListWaypoints` chat command
- Store waypoints in the MemorySmith KB (via `IMemoryGateway`) as structured memory records
- Wire into the LLM chat interpreter so the agent understands "remember this place", "mark the base", "go to the mine", etc.
- Add a deterministic fast-path for short waypoint recall commands

## Implementation sketch
1. Define `WaypointRecord` model (name, position, dimension, timestamp)
2. Add `SetWaypointTool` and `GoToWaypointTool` in `Agent.Tools`
3. Store/retrieve via `RestMemoryGateway`
4. Add "remember" / "save" / "waypoint" keywords to the LLM system prompt

## Complexity
Low-Medium. Mostly integrates existing components (MoveTo, MemoryGateway).

## Priority
Low — nice quality-of-life feature.
